auditable_entities.name: Enterprise Sales Operations
auditable_entities.description: Enterprise segment sales operations including deal execution, contract management, and revenue recognition for large wealth management and RIA clients

auditable_entities.name: Mid-Market Operations
auditable_entities.description: Mid-market segment operations including customer retention, churn management, and gross retention monitoring for smaller RIA clients

auditable_entities.name: Platform Technology Infrastructure
auditable_entities.description: Core technology platform supporting wealth management services including modernization initiatives, system availability, and data processing

auditable_entities.name: AI Analytics Product Division
auditable_entities.description: AI-powered analytics module development and deployment, including machine learning models, data governance, and product delivery

auditable_entities.name: Regulatory Compliance - Americas
auditable_entities.description: SEC, state regulatory, and fiduciary compliance for US operations serving RIAs and wealth management firms

auditable_entities.name: International Operations - UK
auditable_entities.description: UK subsidiary operations including FCA compliance, cross-border data transfers, and local regulatory requirements

auditable_entities.name: Financial Reporting & Revenue Recognition
auditable_entities.description: Financial reporting processes including ASC 606 revenue recognition, multi-element arrangements, and SOX compliance

auditable_entities.name: Data Privacy & Security
auditable_entities.description: Enterprise data protection including client financial data, PII handling, GDPR compliance, and cybersecurity controls

auditable_entities.name: Vendor & Third-Party Management
auditable_entities.description: Third-party risk management including critical vendor oversight, cloud service providers, and data subprocessors

auditable_entities.name: Customer Success & Retention
auditable_entities.description: Customer success operations including onboarding, retention programs, NPS management, and client satisfaction

auditable_entities.name: Human Resources & Talent Management
auditable_entities.description: HR operations including key person management, succession planning, compensation, and organizational development

auditable_entities.name: Treasury & Liquidity Management
auditable_entities.description: Treasury operations including cash management, debt facilities, working capital optimization, and investment policy

assessment_factors.name: Revenue Concentration
assessment_factors.description: Degree of revenue dependency on top enterprise clients
assessment_factors.scoring_criteria: 1-5 scale based on percentage of revenue from top 10 clients

assessment_factors.name: Regulatory Exposure
assessment_factors.description: Level of regulatory scrutiny and compliance complexity
assessment_factors.scoring_criteria: 1-5 scale based on number of regulatory frameworks and recent enforcement actions

assessment_factors.name: Technology Change Velocity
assessment_factors.description: Rate of technology change and associated delivery risk
assessment_factors.scoring_criteria: 1-5 scale based on active transformation initiatives and delivery performance

assessment_factors.name: Control Maturity
assessment_factors.description: Maturity level of internal controls and governance processes
assessment_factors.scoring_criteria: 1-5 scale based on control testing results and deficiency rates

assessment_factors.name: Prior Audit Results
assessment_factors.description: Historical audit performance and finding remediation
assessment_factors.scoring_criteria: 1-5 scale based on prior audit ratings and open finding aging

assessment_factors.name: Business Complexity
assessment_factors.description: Complexity of business processes and organizational structure
assessment_factors.scoring_criteria: 1-5 scale based on geographic spread, product complexity, and integration points

assessment_factors.name: Management Stability
assessment_factors.description: Stability and experience of management team
assessment_factors.scoring_criteria: 1-5 scale based on leadership tenure and recent organizational changes

factor_scores.rationale: Enterprise segment drives 68% of ARR growth
SEC Marketing Rule exposure through wealth management clients
Platform modernization Phase 1 missed Q4 commitment
ITGC gaps identified in prior assessment
Prior audit identified change management weaknesses
FCA formal warning received - compliance framework gaps
Complex multi-element arrangements with AI module launch
ASC 606 complexity with new product offerings
Churn breached projected floors in Q3

audits.name: UK FCA Compliance Remediation Review
audits.description: Comprehensive review of UK regulatory compliance controls following FCA formal warning, including cross-border operations and international compliance framework assessment

audits.name: Revenue Recognition & ASC 606 Compliance Audit
audits.description: Annual audit of revenue recognition practices including multi-element arrangements, AI analytics module contracts, and enterprise deal terms

audits.name: Platform Modernization Project Governance Review
audits.description: Assessment of project management controls, delivery governance, and risk management for platform modernization initiative following Phase 1 delays

audits.name: IT General Controls Assessment
audits.description: Annual ITGC assessment covering access management, change management, and operations controls for core platform and AI analytics systems

audits.name: Mid-Market Segment Operational Review
audits.description: Operational audit of mid-market segment following sustained churn increase and gross retention decline, assessing root causes and control effectiveness

audits.name: SEC Marketing Rule Compliance Review
audits.description: Assessment of marketing practices and compliance controls in response to heightened SEC enforcement activity affecting wealth management technology providers

audits.name: AI Analytics Data Governance Review
audits.description: Comprehensive review of data governance controls for AI analytics module including model validation, data quality, and algorithmic bias assessment

audits.name: Enterprise Sales Contract Management Audit
audits.description: Assessment of enterprise sales contract management including approval workflows, deal structuring, and compliance with pricing policies

audits.name: SOC 2 Type II Examination
audits.description: Annual SOC 2 Type II examination covering security, availability, and confidentiality trust service criteria for platform services

audits.name: Vendor Management & Third-Party Risk Review
audits.description: Assessment of third-party risk management program including critical vendor oversight, cloud provider controls, and data subprocessor management

audit_findings.title: Inadequate Cross-Border Regulatory Monitoring Framework
audit_findings.criteria: International operations require proactive monitoring of regulatory changes across all jurisdictions with documented impact assessments
audit_findings.condition: UK FCA regulatory change impacting marketing practices was not identified until enforcement action. No systematic process exists for monitoring international regulatory developments
audit_findings.cause: Compliance function primarily US-focused with insufficient resources and processes for international regulatory surveillance
audit_findings.effect: FCA formal warning issued, potential reputational damage, and increased regulatory scrutiny in UK market
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement automated regulatory change monitoring system covering all operating jurisdictions with defined escalation protocols and impact assessment requirements
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. Implementing Thomson Reuters Regulatory Intelligence platform with dedicated international compliance analyst. Target completion Q2 2025.

audit_findings.title: Insufficient Documentation of UK Compliance Controls
audit_findings.criteria: All compliance controls must be documented with clear ownership, testing frequency, and evidence requirements per FCA SYSC requirements
audit_findings.condition: UK compliance control documentation incomplete - 40% of controls lacked current operating procedures and 25% had no designated control owner
audit_findings.cause: Rapid UK expansion without commensurate compliance infrastructure investment
audit_findings.effect: Inability to demonstrate compliance control effectiveness to FCA, contributing to regulatory findings
audit_findings.recommendation: Complete UK compliance control documentation including risk control matrices, procedures, and evidence requirements
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. All UK compliance controls documented and control owners assigned. Implemented quarterly control attestation process.

audit_findings.title: Cross-Border Data Transfer Compliance Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: Cross-border data transfers must comply with UK GDPR requirements including valid transfer mechanisms and documented data processing agreements
audit_findings.condition: Standard Contractual Clauses not updated to new EU SCCs for 3 UK-US data transfer arrangements; data processing addenda missing for 2 UK subprocessors
audit_findings.cause: Legal resource constraints and lack of systematic tracking for data transfer compliance requirements
audit_findings.effect: Potential UK GDPR violations and regulatory exposure for unauthorized data transfers
audit_findings.recommendation: Conduct comprehensive data transfer inventory, update all SCCs to current requirements, and implement ongoing monitoring process
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. Engaging external privacy counsel to remediate all data transfer mechanisms. New data transfer management process to be implemented.

audit_findings.title: Inconsistent Revenue Recognition for Multi-Element Arrangements
audit_findings.criteria: ASC 606 requires systematic identification of performance obligations and allocation of transaction price based on standalone selling prices
audit_findings.condition: Review of 15 enterprise contracts identified 4 instances where AI analytics module bundled with platform services was not properly separated as distinct performance obligation. Revenue allocation methodology inconsistently applied across deals.
audit_findings.cause: Lack of formal guidance for new AI analytics product, insufficient finance review of complex deal structures
audit_findings.effect: Potential material misstatement of revenue timing; audit adjustments of $1.2M identified
audit_findings.recommendation: Develop comprehensive ASC 606 guidance for AI analytics module, implement mandatory finance review for all contracts exceeding $200K annual value
audit_findings.management_response: Agree with findings. Implementing enhanced revenue recognition review process and developing standalone selling price analysis for AI analytics module.

audit_findings.title: Inadequate Contract Modification Documentation
audit_findings.criteria: Contract modifications must be documented with clear assessment of whether modification represents new contract or modification of existing contract per ASC 606
audit_findings.condition: 7 of 20 sampled contract amendments lacked documented modification assessment. 3 amendments impacting revenue timing had no finance approval.
audit_findings.cause: Sales team executing amendments without formal change order process, insufficient handoff between sales and finance
audit_findings.effect: Risk of improper revenue recognition treatment for contract modifications
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement formal contract modification workflow requiring finance assessment and approval for all amendments affecting financial terms
audit_findings.management_response: Accepted. Contract modification checklist implemented in CRM with mandatory finance approval workflow for all financial term changes.

audit_findings.title: Insufficient Project Risk Management for Platform Modernization
audit_findings.criteria: Major technology initiatives require comprehensive risk management including risk registers, regular risk reviews, and documented escalation to steering committee
audit_findings.condition: Platform modernization project risk register not updated since project inception. 8 risks materialized without prior identification or escalation. No evidence of risk discussions at steering committee level prior to Phase 1 deadline miss.
audit_findings.cause: Project management focus on delivery without adequate risk governance; steering committee meetings focused on status rather than risks
audit_findings.effect: Phase 1 delivery delayed by 6+ weeks with $800K budget overrun; strategic initiative at risk
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement formal project risk management framework including monthly risk register updates, risk-focused steering committee reviews, and defined escalation thresholds
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. Implementing PMI-based risk management framework. Risk review now standing agenda item for bi-weekly steering committee. External project assurance engaged.

audit_findings.title: Inadequate Change Management for Production Deployments
audit_findings.criteria: All production changes must follow documented change management process including impact assessment, testing requirements, and rollback procedures
audit_findings.condition: 23% of production deployments in Q1 2025 bypassed formal change advisory board review. 3 emergency changes lacked post-implementation review. Change collision caused 4-hour service degradation in February.
audit_findings.cause: Pressure to accelerate modernization deliverables leading to process shortcuts; insufficient CAB capacity to handle change volume
audit_findings.effect: Service availability impacted; increased operational risk; control environment integrity compromised
audit_findings.recommendation: Enforce change management compliance through technical controls, increase CAB capacity, and implement mandatory post-implementation reviews for all changes
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. Implementing technical gate requiring CAB approval for production deployments. Adding additional CAB sessions to increase throughput while maintaining control rigor.

audit_findings.title: Vendor Dependency Risk in Platform Modernization
audit_findings.criteria: Strategic vendor relationships must include documented contingency plans and key person risk mitigation
audit_findings.condition: Platform modernization relies on single implementation partner for specialized components. No documented contingency plan exists. Key partner resources are single points of failure.
audit_findings.cause: Specialized skills required for modernization limited vendor options; contract focused on delivery rather than continuity
audit_findings.effect: Project delivery risk if vendor resources become unavailable; limited negotiating leverage
audit_findings.recommendation: Develop vendor contingency plan including knowledge transfer requirements, secondary vendor identification, and contract amendments for resource continuity
audit_findings.management_response: Partially agree. Implementing enhanced knowledge transfer and documentation requirements. Evaluating secondary vendor options.

audit_findings.title: Privileged Access Review Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: Privileged access must be reviewed quarterly with evidence of recertification decisions and terminated access removal within 24 hours
audit_findings.condition: Q1 2025 privileged access review completed 3 weeks late. 12 terminated employee accounts retained privileged access averaging 18 days post-termination. 2 service accounts with elevated privileges not included in review scope.
audit_findings.cause: Manual review process unable to scale with organizational growth; incomplete privileged account inventory
audit_findings.effect: Excessive privileged access increases risk of unauthorized access and potential data breach
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement privileged access management (PAM) solution with automated reviews, integrate HR termination workflow with identity management, and complete privileged account inventory
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. PAM solution RFP in progress with Q3 implementation target. Immediate remediation of terminated account access completed.

audit_findings.title: Incomplete Segregation of Duties in Development Pipeline
audit_findings.criteria: Development, testing, and production deployment must have enforced segregation of duties with no single individual able to complete all stages
audit_findings.condition: 5 developers have both code commit and production deployment access. Automated pipeline allows same individual to approve and deploy changes in non-production hours.
audit_findings.cause: On-call requirements led to expanded access for production support; pipeline controls not updated to enforce SoD
audit_findings.effect: Risk of unauthorized code deployment; control environment weakness
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement mandatory dual approval for production deployments, remove conflicting access combinations, and update pipeline to enforce SoD controls
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. Implementing mandatory dual approval in deployment pipeline. Restructuring on-call access model to maintain SoD compliance.

audit_findings.title: Inadequate Early Warning System for Customer Churn
audit_findings.criteria: Customer health scoring and churn prediction models must provide 90-day advance warning with documented intervention workflows
audit_findings.condition: Mid-market churn in Q3 exceeded projections by 40%. Post-mortem analysis shows health scoring model failed to flag 60% of churning customers. No documented intervention playbook for at-risk accounts.
audit_findings.cause: Health scoring model not recalibrated since 2023; customer success capacity insufficient for proactive outreach
audit_findings.effect: Accelerated mid-market churn impacting gross retention; strategic review of segment required
audit_findings.recommendation: Recalibrate customer health model with recent churn data, implement automated intervention triggers, and develop documented playbooks for at-risk customer engagement
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. Health model recalibration in progress with data science team. Hiring additional customer success managers for mid-market segment.

audit_findings.title: Insufficient Competitive Intelligence Monitoring
audit_findings.criteria: Competitive landscape should be systematically monitored with documented analysis shared with product and sales leadership
audit_findings.condition: No formal competitive intelligence function exists. Orion AI announcement in Q3 was not anticipated despite public signals. Win/loss analysis not systematically conducted for mid-market deals.
audit_findings.cause: Resource constraints; competitive analysis ad hoc rather than systematic
audit_findings.effect: Reactive rather than proactive competitive positioning; potential market share loss
audit_findings.recommendation: Establish competitive intelligence capability with defined monitoring scope, regular reporting cadence, and integration with product roadmap planning
audit_findings.management_response: Partially agree. Will implement systematic win/loss analysis and competitor monitoring. Full competitive intelligence function to be evaluated in 2026 planning.

audit_findings.title: AI Model Validation Framework Gaps
audit_findings.criteria: AI/ML models in production must have documented validation including accuracy metrics, bias testing, and ongoing performance monitoring
audit_findings.condition: AI analytics module launched without comprehensive model validation documentation. Bias testing performed but not documented to standard. Model drift monitoring not implemented for production models.
audit_findings.cause: Pressure to launch AI analytics module to market; model risk management framework still maturing
audit_findings.effect: Potential regulatory scrutiny for AI use in financial services; model performance degradation may go undetected
audit_findings.recommendation: Implement comprehensive AI model risk management framework including validation standards, bias testing protocols, and ongoing monitoring with defined thresholds
audit_findings.management_response: Agree. Establishing AI governance committee and implementing model risk management framework aligned with SR 11-7 guidance.

risks.name: International Regulatory Compliance Failure
risks.description: Risk of non-compliance with international financial services regulations, particularly UK FCA requirements, resulting in enforcement actions, penalties, and reputational damage

risks.name: Commercial Execution Volatility
risks.description: Risk of inconsistent sales performance and quota attainment creating revenue predictability challenges and requiring leadership changes

risks.name: Platform Modernization Delivery Failure
risks.description: Risk that platform modernization initiative fails to deliver on schedule and budget, impacting competitive positioning and operational efficiency

risks.name: Mid-Market Segment Deterioration
risks.description: Risk of continued decline in mid-market segment performance including accelerating churn, declining gross retention, and potential strategic repositioning requirements

risks.name: Revenue Recognition Complexity
risks.description: Risk of material misstatement in revenue recognition due to complex multi-element arrangements, new AI analytics product offerings, and extended enterprise contracts

risks.name: Competitive Threat Intensification
risks.description: Risk that competitive pressure from Orion and other providers with AI capabilities erodes market position and extends sales cycles

risks.name: AI Product Governance Deficiency
risks.description: Risk that AI analytics module lacks adequate governance including model validation, bias testing, and ongoing monitoring, creating regulatory and reputational exposure

risks.name: EBITDA Margin Compression
risks.description: Risk of continued margin pressure from increasing operational costs, talent competition, and required investments outpacing revenue growth

risks.name: Cybersecurity and Data Protection Breach
risks.description: Risk of cybersecurity incident resulting in unauthorized access to client financial data, service disruption, or regulatory penalties

risks.name: Data Privacy Compliance Failure
risks.description: Risk of non-compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and other data privacy regulations resulting in penalties and reputational damage

risks.name: Critical Vendor Dependency
risks.description: Risk that dependency on critical technology vendors creates operational continuity exposure and limits strategic flexibility

risks.name: Enterprise Customer Concentration
risks.description: Risk that high revenue concentration in enterprise segment creates dependency on small number of large clients

risks.name: Key Person Dependency - Technology Leadership
risks.description: Risk that departure of key technology leaders creates knowledge loss and delivery disruption during critical modernization period

risks.name: SEC Marketing Rule Compliance
risks.description: Risk of non-compliance with SEC Marketing Rule requirements affecting wealth management clients and creating enforcement exposure

risks.name: Working Capital Volatility
risks.description: Risk that working capital fluctuations create liquidity stress despite overall strong cash position

risks.name: Extended Sales Cycle Risk
risks.description: Risk that extended enterprise sales cycles (14+ months) reduce revenue predictability and increase deal execution risk

risks.name: Fiduciary Liability Exposure
risks.description: Risk of liability claims arising from platform failures affecting client assets or fiduciary compliance of RIA customers

risks.name: Service Availability Disruption
risks.description: Risk of unplanned service outage impacting client operations and creating contractual liability

risk_assessments.notes: FCA formal warning received in December 2024. Remediation plan in development. High residual risk until controls implemented.
UK compliance control documentation completed. Regulatory monitoring system implementation in progress. Impact reduced as no additional enforcement action.
Regulatory intelligence platform implemented. All cross-border data transfers remediated. Likelihood reduced with improved monitoring capabilities.
Controls operating effectively. Ongoing FCA relationship management positive. Risk within tolerance.
Q1 new sales attainment at 87%. CRO transition creating uncertainty. Pipeline visibility improving but deal slippage elevated.
Q2 attainment improved to 94%. New CRO onboarded. Enhanced pipeline discipline showing results.
Q3 performance on track. Forecasting accuracy improved. Enterprise wins offsetting mid-market challenges.
Q4 attainment on track for 101%. Commercial controls stabilized. Risk within tolerance.
Phase 1 missed Q4 2024 commitment. Delivery timeline risk elevated. External project assurance engaged.
Phase 1 completed with delay. Risk management framework implemented. Budget overrun contained. Impact reduced as critical path resolved.
Phase 2 tracking to plan. Governance improvements embedded. Vendor dependency being addressed. Risk elevated but stable.
Delivery cadence improved. Change management controls strengthened. Risk remains above tolerance but trending positively.
Early signals of retention pressure in mid-market. Health scoring being monitored. Within historical norms.
Gross retention declining. Churn acceleration noted. Competitive pressure from smaller providers.
Churn breached projected floors. Health scoring model ineffective. Strategic review initiated.
Customer success investments showing early impact. Health model recalibrated. Still above tolerance but improving.
AI analytics module launch creating new revenue recognition complexity. Enhanced review procedures being developed.
Audit identified SSP methodology gaps. Remediation underway. Impact reduced with no material misstatement.
SSP analysis completed. Finance review process implemented. Controls operating effectively.
Revenue recognition controls operating as designed. Risk within tolerance.
Competitive landscape stable. AI capabilities becoming differentiator. Product roadmap aligned.
Orion AI announcement creating market pressure. Sales cycle extension observed in competitive deals.
Competitive pressure intensified. Win rates in mid-market declining. Compliance differentiation emphasized.
AI analytics module gaining traction. Compliance positioning resonating post-SEC enforcement wave. Risk stabilized.
AI analytics module in beta. Initial validation performed. Production governance developing.
GA launch accelerated. Validation documentation incomplete. Model drift monitoring deferred.
Regulatory scrutiny of AI in financial services increasing. SR 11-7 alignment required. Governance committee forming.
Model risk management framework implementation underway. Governance committee operational. Risk improving.
EBITDA margin 18.8%. Hiring costs elevated. Investment requirements increasing.
EBITDA margin 18.0%. Cost management initiatives implemented. Margin pressure contained.
EBITDA margin 17.8%. Revenue growth deceleration to 10.4% YoY creating efficiency pressure.
Operating margin stabilizing at 14.0%. Enterprise momentum improving revenue mix. Risk improving.
Threat landscape elevated. SOC monitoring effective. No significant incidents.
ITGC audit initiated. PAM improvements in progress. Likelihood reduced with control investments.
SOC 2 Type II passed. ITGC findings being remediated. Security posture improving.
PAM solution implementation in progress. SoD remediation on track. Risk within tolerance.
UK data transfer gaps identified in FCA review. GDPR exposure elevated.
SCC updates in progress. Data transfer inventory complete. Likelihood reduced with remediation.
SCC remediation substantially complete. Ongoing monitoring process implemented.
All data transfers compliant. Privacy controls operating effectively. Risk at tolerance.
Critical vendor relationships stable. Contingency planning for modernization vendor identified as gap.
Modernization vendor dependency highlighted in project audit. Contingency plan development initiated.
Knowledge transfer requirements implemented. Secondary vendor evaluation in progress.
Vendor management maturity improved. Risk within tolerance.
Enterprise segment driving growth. Top 10 customers represent 28% of ARR. Diversification ongoing.
Large enterprise wins in Q2 increasing concentration. New customer acquisition offsetting.
Mid-market churn increasing relative concentration in enterprise. Monitoring enhanced.
New logo acquisition improving diversification. Customer health programs protecting enterprise base.
Key person dependencies in platform modernization team identified. Succession planning gaps.
Succession plans developed for critical roles. Retention programs enhanced. Documentation improved.
Key person risk mitigated through redundancy and knowledge transfer. Retention metrics stable.
Key person risk within tolerance. Succession planning embedded in talent review process.
SEC Marketing Rule compliance framework in place. Heightened enforcement environment monitored.
SEC enforcement actions against wealth tech competitors. Enhanced monitoring implemented.
SEC Marketing Rule audit completed satisfactorily. Compliance controls validated.
Compliance differentiation positioning effective. Risk within tolerance.
Cash position $312.7M. Liquidity strong but working capital timing being monitored.
Cash declined to $298.4M. Working capital volatility elevated. DSO trending higher.
Cash recovered to $358.2M. Collections improved. Working capital normalized.
Liquidity strong with $358.2M cash vs $98.6M debt. Risk well within tolerance.
Average enterprise sales cycle 14.2 months. Deal slippage elevated. Pipeline staging enhanced.
Sales cycle remained extended. Competitive dynamics adding uncertainty. Deal qualification improved.
Sales enablement improvements reducing cycle time for qualified opportunities. Risk improving.
Q4 deal velocity improved. Forecasting accuracy enhanced. Risk within tolerance.
Fiduciary exposure through RIA clients. Service level commitments strong. No active claims.
Platform stability maintained. Insurance coverage reviewed and adequate. Risk stable.
No fiduciary claims. SOC 2 certification supports client compliance requirements.
Fiduciary exposure managed through SLA performance and insurance. Risk within tolerance.
Uptime 99.9%. Change collision incident in February caused 4-hour degradation. Change controls strengthened.
No significant availability incidents. Change management improvements reducing risk.
Platform stability maintained during modernization. Monitoring enhanced.
SLA performance exceeding targets. Risk within tolerance.

risk_mitigation_plans.description: Comprehensive program to strengthen international regulatory compliance capabilities following FCA formal warning
Strengthen project risk management and delivery governance for platform modernization initiative
Strategic initiative to address mid-market segment deterioration through improved customer success and product-market fit
Establish comprehensive AI governance framework aligned with SR 11-7 guidance and emerging regulatory expectations
Implement PAM solution and strengthen access controls to address ITGC findings

controls.name: Enterprise Pipeline Governance
controls.description: Weekly pipeline review process with deal staging requirements, probability calibration, and executive oversight for opportunities exceeding $150K ACV
controls.test_procedure: Review pipeline review meeting minutes, test deal staging accuracy for sample of opportunities
controls.evidence_required: Pipeline reports, meeting minutes, deal stage history

controls.name: Forecast Accuracy Tracking
controls.description: Monthly comparison of forecast vs actual performance with root cause analysis for variances exceeding 10%
controls.test_procedure: Review forecast accuracy reports and variance analysis documentation
controls.evidence_required: Forecast reports, variance analysis, management review sign-off

controls.name: Sales Quota Setting and Review
controls.description: Quarterly quota setting process with board approval for annual targets and executive review for quarterly adjustments
controls.test_procedure: Review quota approval documentation and board materials
controls.evidence_required: Board presentation, quota approval records, executive sign-off

controls.name: Competitive Deal Review
controls.description: Mandatory competitive analysis and response strategy documentation for all enterprise opportunities with identified competitor involvement
controls.test_procedure: Sample test competitive deal documentation for completeness
controls.evidence_required: Competitive analysis records, deal strategy documentation

controls.name: Monthly Financial Review
controls.description: Monthly management review of financial performance including EBITDA variance analysis, cost center reviews, and margin trending
controls.test_procedure: Review monthly financial reporting packages and management discussion documentation
controls.evidence_required: Financial reports, variance analysis, management sign-off

controls.name: Budget vs Actual Monitoring
controls.description: Weekly monitoring of budget vs actual spending with automated alerts for variances exceeding 5% and escalation requirements for 10%+ variances
controls.test_procedure: Test automated alert generation and escalation tracking
controls.evidence_required: Alert logs, escalation records, variance resolution documentation

controls.name: Headcount Approval Control
controls.description: CFO approval required for all new headcount requests with financial impact assessment and alignment to annual plan
controls.test_procedure: Sample test headcount approvals for proper authorization
controls.evidence_required: Approval records, headcount requisitions, financial impact assessments

controls.name: Revenue Recognition Policy Application
controls.description: Documented ASC 606 policy with mandatory checklist for all new contracts and modifications identifying performance obligations and transaction price allocation
controls.test_procedure: Sample test contract revenue recognition treatment for compliance with policy and ASC 606
controls.evidence_required: Revenue recognition checklists, SSP documentation, contract analyses

controls.name: Finance Review of Complex Contracts
controls.description: Mandatory finance review for all contracts exceeding $200K annual value or containing non-standard terms prior to execution
controls.test_procedure: Test finance approval workflow for sample of qualifying contracts
controls.evidence_required: Contract approval records, finance review documentation, CRM workflow logs

controls.name: Contract Modification Control
controls.description: Formal change order process for all contract amendments with finance assessment of revenue recognition impact
controls.test_procedure: Sample test contract amendments for proper modification assessment
controls.evidence_required: Change order documentation, modification assessments, approval records

controls.name: Customer Concentration Monitoring
controls.description: Quarterly analysis of customer concentration with reporting to executive team when any customer exceeds 5% of ARR
controls.test_procedure: Review concentration analysis reports and executive reporting
controls.evidence_required: Concentration reports, executive presentation materials, action plans

controls.name: Customer Health Scoring
controls.description: Automated customer health scoring system with weekly refresh incorporating usage, engagement, NPS, and support ticket metrics
controls.test_procedure: Validate health score accuracy against actual churn outcomes
controls.evidence_required: Health score reports, model validation results, churn correlation analysis

controls.name: At-Risk Customer Intervention
controls.description: Defined escalation and intervention process for customers flagged as at-risk by health scoring with mandatory outreach within 48 hours
controls.test_procedure: Sample test intervention timeliness and documentation for at-risk flagged customers
controls.evidence_required: Intervention records, outreach logs, resolution documentation

controls.name: Win/Loss Analysis Program
controls.description: Systematic win/loss analysis for all closed opportunities exceeding $50K with competitive intelligence documentation and product feedback loop
controls.test_procedure: Sample test win/loss documentation completeness and product feedback integration
controls.evidence_required: Win/loss analyses, competitive intelligence reports, product feedback tickets

controls.name: Regulatory Change Monitoring
controls.description: Automated regulatory change monitoring using Thomson Reuters Regulatory Intelligence platform with defined impact assessment and escalation protocols
controls.test_procedure: Test alert generation and impact assessment process for regulatory changes
controls.evidence_required: Regulatory alerts, impact assessments, escalation records

controls.name: UK Compliance Control Framework
controls.description: Documented UK-specific compliance control framework including FCA SYSC requirements with quarterly control attestation process
controls.test_procedure: Review control attestations and supporting evidence
controls.evidence_required: Control attestations, procedure documentation, evidence files

controls.name: Cross-Border Data Transfer Compliance
controls.description: Data transfer inventory with documented legal basis for all cross-border transfers and annual compliance certification
controls.test_procedure: Review data transfer inventory and legal basis documentation
controls.evidence_required: Transfer inventory, SCCs, DPAs, compliance certifications

controls.name: Data Processing Agreement Management
controls.description: Centralized DPA repository with automated renewal tracking and compliance verification for all data subprocessors
controls.test_procedure: Test DPA inventory completeness and renewal tracking accuracy
controls.evidence_required: DPA repository, renewal tracking reports, compliance verifications

controls.name: Privacy Impact Assessment
controls.description: Mandatory PIA process for all new data processing activities, product features, or third-party integrations involving personal data
controls.test_procedure: Sample test PIAs for new processing activities
controls.evidence_required: PIA documentation, approval records, processing registers

controls.name: Marketing Compliance Review
controls.description: Pre-publication compliance review for all marketing materials targeting RIA and wealth management clients to ensure SEC Marketing Rule compliance
controls.test_procedure: Sample test marketing materials for compliance review documentation
controls.evidence_required: Compliance review checklists, approval records, material archives

controls.name: Project Risk Register Management
controls.description: Bi-weekly risk register review for strategic projects with defined escalation thresholds and steering committee reporting
controls.test_procedure: Review risk register updates and steering committee meeting evidence
controls.evidence_required: Risk registers, meeting minutes, escalation records

controls.name: Project Steering Committee Oversight
controls.description: Bi-weekly steering committee meetings for strategic projects with defined agenda including risk review, budget tracking, and milestone assessment
controls.test_procedure: Review steering committee attendance and decision documentation
controls.evidence_required: Meeting minutes, decision logs, action item tracking

controls.name: Change Advisory Board Process
controls.description: Formal CAB approval required for all production changes with impact assessment, testing validation, and rollback procedures
controls.test_procedure: Sample test production changes for CAB approval and documentation
controls.evidence_required: Change tickets, CAB approval records, test evidence, rollback plans

controls.name: Post-Implementation Review
controls.description: Mandatory PIR within 5 business days for all production changes with documented lessons learned and process improvement tracking
controls.test_procedure: Sample test PIR completion timeliness and quality
controls.evidence_required: PIR documentation, lessons learned records, improvement tracking

controls.name: Critical Vendor Risk Assessment
controls.description: Annual risk assessment for critical vendors including financial viability, security posture, and business continuity with contingency planning requirements
controls.test_procedure: Review vendor risk assessments and contingency plans for critical vendors
controls.evidence_required: Risk assessments, SOC reports, contingency plans, financial analysis

controls.name: Privileged Access Recertification
controls.description: Quarterly recertification of privileged access by system owners with documented approval and evidence of removed access for terminated personnel
controls.test_procedure: Test recertification process and access removal timeliness
controls.evidence_required: Recertification records, access removal evidence, reconciliation reports

controls.name: Termination Access Revocation
controls.description: Automated access revocation within 24 hours of termination notification from HR with reconciliation verification
controls.test_procedure: Test termination workflow and access revocation timeliness
controls.evidence_required: Termination tickets, access logs, reconciliation reports

controls.name: Segregation of Duties Enforcement
controls.description: Technical enforcement of SoD in development pipeline preventing single individual from committing, approving, and deploying code
controls.test_procedure: Test pipeline SoD controls and review access matrices
controls.evidence_required: Pipeline configuration, access matrices, deployment logs

controls.name: AI Model Validation
controls.description: Pre-production validation process for AI/ML models including accuracy testing, bias assessment, and documented approval by AI governance committee
controls.test_procedure: Review model validation documentation and governance committee approvals
controls.evidence_required: Validation reports, bias assessments, committee meeting minutes, approval records

controls.name: AI Model Performance Monitoring
controls.description: Ongoing monitoring of production AI model performance with defined drift thresholds and escalation procedures
controls.test_procedure: Review monitoring dashboards and drift alert handling
controls.evidence_required: Monitoring reports, drift alerts, investigation records

controls.name: AI Bias Testing
controls.description: Systematic bias testing for AI models against protected characteristics with documented methodology and remediation tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review bias testing methodology and results documentation
controls.evidence_required: Bias test results, methodology documentation, remediation records

controls.name: Security Monitoring and SOC Operations
controls.description: 24x7 security monitoring with defined detection rules, incident response procedures, and escalation protocols
controls.test_procedure: Test detection rules and incident response capabilities
controls.evidence_required: Detection logs, incident reports, response metrics

controls.name: Vendor Business Continuity Validation
controls.description: Annual validation of business continuity plans for critical vendors including DR testing evidence and recovery time capabilities
controls.test_procedure: Review vendor BC/DR documentation and test evidence
controls.evidence_required: Vendor BC plans, DR test reports, recovery capability assessments

controls.name: Key Person Identification and Succession Planning
controls.description: Annual identification of key personnel with succession planning requirements and progress tracking
controls.test_procedure: Review key person list and succession plan documentation
controls.evidence_required: Key person registry, succession plans, progress reports

controls.name: Knowledge Documentation Requirements
controls.description: Mandatory knowledge documentation for critical processes and systems with quarterly review of documentation currency
controls.test_procedure: Review documentation completeness and currency for critical systems
controls.evidence_required: Documentation inventory, review records, update logs

controls.name: Cash Flow Forecasting
controls.description: Rolling 13-week cash flow forecast with weekly updates and variance analysis
controls.test_procedure: Review cash flow forecasts and variance analysis
controls.evidence_required: Cash flow forecasts, variance reports, management reviews

controls.name: Working Capital Monitoring
controls.description: Monthly monitoring of DSO, DPO, and working capital metrics with defined thresholds and escalation requirements
controls.test_procedure: Review working capital metrics and escalation records
controls.evidence_required: Working capital reports, trend analysis, escalation documentation

controls.name: Service Level Monitoring
controls.description: Continuous monitoring of platform availability and performance against contractual SLAs with automated alerting
controls.test_procedure: Test SLA monitoring and alerting capabilities
controls.evidence_required: SLA reports, alert logs, incident correlation

controls.name: Professional Liability Insurance Review
controls.description: Annual review of E&O and professional liability insurance coverage for adequacy against fiduciary exposure
controls.test_procedure: Review insurance policy terms and coverage analysis
controls.evidence_required: Policy documents, coverage analysis, broker recommendations

controls.name: Platform Redundancy and Failover
controls.description: Geographic redundancy with automated failover capabilities and defined RTO/RPO targets
controls.test_procedure: Test failover capabilities and recovery time
controls.evidence_required: DR test results, failover logs, RTO/RPO measurements

controls.name: Incident Management Process
controls.description: Defined incident management process with severity classification, communication protocols, and post-incident review requirements
controls.test_procedure: Review incident response procedures and post-incident reviews
controls.evidence_required: Incident records, communication logs, PIR documentation

control_assessments.test_evidence: Health scoring model failed to predict 60% of Q3 churning customers. Model accuracy validation showed significant degradation from 2023 baseline.
23% of Q1 production deployments bypassed CAB. Technical gate implementation in progress. 77% compliance achieved.
Q1 recertification completed 3 weeks late. 12 terminated accounts retained privileged access. PAM solution implementation underway.
5 developers have conflicting access combinations. Pipeline allows same individual to approve and deploy during non-production hours.
4 of 15 sampled enterprise contracts had improper performance obligation identification for AI analytics module. SSP methodology inconsistently applied.
AI analytics module launched without complete validation documentation. Bias testing performed but not documented to standard. Governance committee now operational.
Sampled 25 enterprise opportunities. All had proper staging documentation, probability calibration, and executive review evidence.
Monthly financial reviews completed timely with appropriate variance analysis. Management sign-off documented.
Regulatory intelligence platform operational. Alert generation and impact assessment process working as designed.
24x7 monitoring operational. Detection rules tested and effective. Incident response metrics within targets.

control_deficiencies.description: Customer health scoring model failed to accurately predict mid-market churn, missing 60% of churning customers prior to loss
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Model not recalibrated since 2023; behavioral patterns have shifted; insufficient training data for mid-market segment
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Recalibrate health model with 2024-2025 churn data, add mid-market specific features, implement quarterly model validation

control_deficiencies.description: 23% of production deployments bypassed formal CAB review in Q1 2025
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Pressure to accelerate modernization deliverables; insufficient CAB capacity for change volume
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement technical gate requiring CAB approval, increase CAB capacity with additional sessions

control_deficiencies.description: Privileged access recertification process gaps including late completion and terminated account retention
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Manual review process unable to scale; incomplete privileged account inventory; HR-IAM workflow gaps
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement PAM solution, integrate HR termination workflow, complete privileged account inventory

control_deficiencies.description: Segregation of duties not enforced in deployment pipeline allowing same individual to approve and deploy
control_deficiencies.root_cause: On-call requirements led to expanded access; pipeline controls not updated to enforce SoD
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement mandatory dual approval, remove conflicting access combinations, restructure on-call access model

control_deficiencies.description: Revenue recognition policy not consistently applied to AI analytics module bundled arrangements
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Lack of formal guidance for new AI product; insufficient finance review of complex deal structures
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Develop comprehensive ASC 606 guidance for AI module, implement mandatory finance review for contracts >$200K

control_deficiencies.description: AI model validation framework lacks comprehensive documentation and bias testing standards
control_deficiencies.root_cause: Pressure to launch AI analytics module; model risk management framework still maturing
control_deficiencies.remediation_plan: Implement comprehensive AI model risk framework aligned with SR 11-7, document validation standards

processes.description: Governance of international subsidiary operations including local compliance, reporting, and risk management

processes.name: Data Privacy Management

processes.description: IT operations including change management, access management, incident management, and security operations

objectives.name: Enterprise Revenue Growth

objectives.name: New Logo Acquisition
objectives.description: Acquire 45 new enterprise logos to diversify customer base

objectives.name: Maintain EBITDA Margin
objectives.description: Maintain EBITDA margin above 17% while investing in growth initiatives

objectives.name: Financial Reporting Accuracy

objectives.name: Customer Retention Excellence

objectives.name: Regulatory Compliance

objectives.name: Platform Availability

objectives.name: Security Posture

objectives.name: Liquidity Management

standards_regulations.name: ASC 606 - Revenue from Contracts with Customers
standards_regulations.description: US GAAP standard for revenue recognition from customer contracts

standards_regulations.name: SEC Marketing Rule (Rule 206(4)-1)
standards_regulations.description: SEC rule governing investment adviser advertising and testimonials
standards_regulations.applicability: Marketing to RIA and wealth management clients

standards_regulations.name: FCA SYSC (Senior Management Arrangements, Systems and Controls)
standards_regulations.description: UK FCA requirements for systems and controls in regulated firms

standards_regulations.name: GDPR - General Data Protection Regulation
standards_regulations.description: EU regulation on data protection and privacy
standards_regulations.applicability: All processing of EU/UK personal data

standards_regulations.name: SOC 2 Type II
standards_regulations.description: AICPA service organization control standard for security, availability, and confidentiality

standards_regulations.name: SR 11-7 - Guidance on Model Risk Management
standards_regulations.description: Federal Reserve guidance on model risk management for banking organizations
standards_regulations.applicability: AI/ML models used in financial services

standards_regulations.name: CCPA - California Consumer Privacy Act
standards_regulations.description: California state law governing consumer privacy rights

standards_regulations.name: DOL Fiduciary Rule
standards_regulations.description: Department of Labor rule defining fiduciary duties for retirement plan advice
standards_regulations.applicability: Platform features supporting retirement plan advice

requirements.requirement_text: Identify performance obligations in contracts with customers and allocate transaction price based on standalone selling prices
requirements.compliance_notes: SSP methodology for AI analytics module requires enhancement per audit findings

requirements.requirement_text: Marketing materials must include required disclosures and not contain misleading statements
Firms must establish and maintain systems and controls appropriate to their business
requirements.compliance_notes: UK control framework remediated following FCA warning

requirements.requirement_text: Cross-border data transfers require valid legal mechanisms such as SCCs
requirements.compliance_notes: All SCCs updated to current requirements

requirements.requirement_text: Maintain effective access controls with periodic review and timely removal of terminated access
requirements.compliance_notes: PAM solution implementation in progress to address gaps

requirements.requirement_text: Models should be subject to a validation process that includes evaluation of conceptual soundness and ongoing monitoring
requirements.compliance_notes: Model risk management framework implementation in progress

requirements.requirement_text: Conduct Data Protection Impact Assessments for high-risk processing activities
Maintain formal change management process for production systems
requirements.compliance_notes: CAB bypass rate being addressed through technical enforcement

requests.request_description: Provide complete UK compliance control documentation including risk control matrix, procedures, and control owner assignments
Provide inventory of all cross-border data transfers between UK and US including legal basis documentation
Provide sample of 15 enterprise contracts executed in Q4 2024 and Q1 2025 including AI analytics module bundles
Provide standalone selling price analysis documentation for AI analytics module
Provide platform modernization steering committee meeting minutes for Q1 and Q2 2025
Provide change management system report for all Q1 2025 production changes including CAB approval status
Provide privileged access user listing and Q1 2025 recertification evidence
Provide developer access matrix showing code commit and production deployment permissions
Provide customer health scoring model validation documentation and accuracy metrics
Provide mid-market churn analysis with customer health score correlation for Q1-Q3 2025
Provide AI analytics module model validation documentation including bias testing results

assessment_methods.name: Control Walkthrough
assessment_methods.description: End-to-end walkthrough of control process with control owner to understand design and operation
assessment_methods.documentation_requirements: Walkthrough notes, process flow diagrams, control documentation

assessment_methods.name: Sample Testing
assessment_methods.description: Statistical or judgmental sampling of control operation with testing of individual transactions
assessment_methods.documentation_requirements: Sample selection methodology, test results, exception documentation

assessment_methods.name: Automated Control Testing
assessment_methods.description: Full population testing using data analytics for automated controls
assessment_methods.documentation_requirements: Test scripts, data extraction evidence, exception reports

assessment_methods.name: Risk Assessment Workshop
assessment_methods.description: Facilitated workshop with risk owners to assess inherent and residual risk levels
assessment_methods.documentation_requirements: Workshop attendance, risk scoring documentation, supporting rationale

assessment_methods.name: Document Review
assessment_methods.description: Review of policies, procedures, and supporting documentation for adequacy and currency
assessment_methods.documentation_requirements: Document listing, review notes, gap analysis

assessment_methods.name: System Configuration Review
assessment_methods.description: Technical review of system configurations against security baselines and best practices
assessment_methods.documentation_requirements: Configuration extracts, baseline comparison, deviation analysis

assessment_methods.name: Penetration Testing
assessment_methods.description: Authorized simulated attack to test security controls and identify vulnerabilities
assessment_methods.documentation_requirements: Scope definition, testing results, vulnerability assessment, remediation tracking

assessment_methods.name: Management Inquiry
assessment_methods.description: Interviews with management to understand processes, controls, and risk awareness
